_doc: Per-instance PIM workload-template exemptions (engine/_shared/PIM-Conformance.ps1). An absent desired binding is a GAP unless an ACTIVE exemption row makes it EXEMPT. 'reason' AND 'expiresUtc' are MANDATORY -- exemptions always expire; no-expiry is ignored (warned), and once expiresUtc passes it lapses back to Gap and re-enters the next deploy. Copy to exemptions.json (gitignored, per instance configRoot) for live use. tenantId = the manager instance name; itemKey must match a template entry 'key'.

exemptions.reason: This tenant manages Sec Admin delegation manually; PIM binding deferred to their change window.
